result.stdout:
Usage: [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Compile Ruby source file to mruby bytecode

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Input Ruby source file path

Options:
  -o|--output <string?>            Output file path (default: same directory as input with .mrb/.cs extension) (Default: null)
  --dump                           Dump bytecode in human-readable format instead of compiling (outputs to stdout) (Optional)
  --format <OutputFormat>          Output format: binary or csharp (Default: binary)
  --csharp-namespace <string?>     C# namespace for generated code (Default: null)
  --csharp-class-name <string?>    C# class name for generated code (Default: null)
